reason: Walled gardens or ToS-restricted content. Use official APIs only or skip entirely.

notes.linkedin.com: ToS forbids scraping. Apollo and Seamless got removed in 2025.
notes.facebook.com: ToS forbids scraping. Use Graph API only.
notes.instagram.com/p: Post-level scraping forbidden. Public profile metadata via official Basic Display API only.
notes.tiktok.com/@: Profile-level scraping forbidden. Use TikTok for Developers API only.
